scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location backend; if (!(Test-Path venv)) { python -m venv venv }; .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.test:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location backend; if (Test-Path venv) { .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest } else { python -m pytest }"
